description: Home page loads at the correct URL
Home page title should be KNOOZ
Exchange button should be visible on the home page
Sign In button should be visible on the home page
Register button should be visible on the home page
Contact Us link should be visible on the home page
Language icon should be visible on the home page
Theme toggle icon should be visible on the home page
KNOOZ logo should be visible on the home page
Clicking Exchange navigates to the ETH/USDT trading page
First Log In link on the Exchange page navigates to login
Second Log In link on the Exchange page navigates to login
First Register link on the Exchange page navigates to create account
Second Register link on the Exchange page navigates to create account
Available balance without login should show 0 on the Exchange page
Sign In button on the home page navigates to login
Register button on the home page navigates to create account
Contact Us link navigates to the support page
Sign In button on the support page navigates to login
Clicking the logo on the login page navigates home
Select English language and verify English content is shown
Select Arabic language and verify Arabic content is shown
Default theme on page load should be dark
Toggling the theme should switch from dark to light
Toggling the theme again should switch back from light to dark
